entries.title: Amazon Bedrock Launches AI Agent Payment Capabilities With Coinbase, Stripe
entries.summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) announced in a Thursday (May 7) company blog post a set of tools designed to allow artificial intelligence agents to conduct financial transactions autonomously. The new feature, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments, enables AI agents to instantly access and pay for digital resources such as web content, APIs and specialized services, […] The post Amazon Bedrock Launch

entries.title: ServiceNow, SAP and Workday Make AI Agents Pay to Play
entries.summary: ServiceNow, SAP and Workday are drawing new lines around the customer data stored inside their platforms as external artificial intelligence (AI) agents begin to erode the per-seat pricing model that has defined enterprise software for two decades. entries.title: Visa Announces Global Expansion of Agentic Ready Program
entries.summary: Visa’s Agentic Ready program is now available in Asia Pacific and Latin America Designed to support the payments ecosystem as it prepares for a new era of agentic commerce SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Visa Inc. entries.title: The Connected Economy Is Making Companies Worth a Trillion Dollars
entries.summary: Samsung’s arrival in the trillion-dollar club this week expands a roster that increasingly defines who controls the architecture of the modern global economy. That 15-company list of firms with a market capitalization north of $1 trillion spans familiar technology titans alongside companies that, at first glance, may appear to have little in common. After […] The post The Connected Economy I

entries.title: Relaunched Dick’s Sporting Goods Credit Card Offers 10% Back
entries.summary: Dick’s Sporting Goods has relaunched its credit card program and now offers its cardholders 10% back in rewards on qualifying purchases at its brands. The retailer relaunched its credit card program with consumer financing company Synchrony, continuing a collaboration that has been in place for more than 20 years, and rebranded the program as […] The post Relaunched Dick’s Sporting Goods Cre

entries.title: Visa Accelerates Stablecoin Momentum: Adding Five Blockchains for Settlement
entries.summary: Stablecoin settlement pilot sees record growth 50% quarter over quarter, reaching $7B run rate. SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Today, Visa (NYSE: V) announced that it is adding five blockchains to its global stablecoin settlement pilot, expanding how issuers and acquirers can settle with the network.
